name: certificate_verification
image_prompt: A digital certificate with blockchain verification checkmark
response_template: Certificate verification involves: 1) Upload file 2) Generate SHA256 hash 3) Check blockchain registry 4) AI content analysis 5) Return results

name: blockchain_security
image_prompt: Interconnected blocks with security locks and certificates
response_template: Blockchain provides immutable storage where each certificate hash is permanently recorded and cannot be altered or deleted

name: ai_validation
image_prompt: Robot analyzing document with magnifying glass
response_template: AI validation analyzes certificate content for keywords format structure and authenticity patterns with confidence scoring

name: admin_dashboard
image_prompt: Clean dashboard with charts and certificate management tools
response_template: Admin dashboard allows universities to manage verifiers add certificates generate reports and view feedback

name: verifier_portal
image_prompt: Professional verification screen with upload area
response_template: Verifier portal enables employers to upload certificates for verification and submit feedback about the system

name: hash_generation
image_prompt: Mathematical formula converting document to unique hash
response_template: Each certificate generates a unique SHA256 hash that serves as its digital fingerprint for blockchain storage

name: file_formats
image_prompt: Icons showing PDF JPG PNG file formats
response_template: System supports PDF JPG JPEG and PNG file formats with maximum size limits for certificate uploads

name: authentication
image_prompt: Lock and key with digital token
response_template: Authentication uses JWT tokens with role-based access control for admin and verifier accounts

name: feedback_system
response_template: Feedback system allows verifiers to submit issues suggestions and experiences for system improvement

name: reports_analytics
image_prompt: Charts and graphs showing verification data
response_template: Reports provide insights on verification counts success rates and system usage patterns

name: verification_process
response_template: Verification workflow: File upload → Hash generation → Blockchain check → AI analysis → Result display

name: blockchain_registry
image_prompt: Network of connected nodes storing data
response_template: Blockchain registry maintains permanent immutable records of all registered certificate hashes

name: confidence_scoring
response_template: AI confidence scoring evaluates certificate authenticity from 0-100% based on content analysis

name: validation_tokens
response_template: Each AI validation generates a unique token for audit trails and verification tracking

name: role_management
image_prompt: User icons with different permission levels
response_template: System supports two roles: Admin (full management) and Verifier (certificate validation only)

name: system_health
response_template: System health endpoint provides real-time status of all application components and services

name: api_endpoints
response_template: API provides endpoints for authentication certificate management verification and chatbot interactions

name: security_features
response_template: Security includes JWT authentication password hashing CORS protection and file validation

name: error_handling
response_template: System handles errors gracefully with proper user feedback and logging for troubleshooting

name: data_privacy
response_template: System protects user data with encryption secure storage and privacy compliance measures

name: performance_optimization
response_template: Performance optimizations include caching efficient algorithms and resource management

name: user_experience
image_prompt: Happy user interacting with clean interface
response_template: User experience focuses on intuitive navigation clear feedback and responsive design

name: integration_apis
response_template: System provides APIs for integration with external university and employer management systems

name: backup_recovery
response_template: Backup systems ensure data protection with automated backups and disaster recovery procedures

name: scalability
response_template: Architecture supports horizontal scaling to handle increased users and certificate volumes

name: audit_trails
response_template: Comprehensive audit trails track all system activities for compliance and security monitoring

name: compliance_standards
response_template: System adheres to educational and industry standards for certificate verification and data handling
